what: Persist active project reference and lastUsedAt updates so startup can restore the latest valid active project while respecting archive and invalid-path rules.

where.description: Add methods/queries for setting and reading active project metadata.
Ensure active query applies validity/fallback rules from persisted metadata.
Add integration tests for startup restore and lastUsedAt updates.

acceptance.given: Two valid projects where one is selected last
acceptance.when: GetActiveProject is called after restart simulation
acceptance.then: The last selected valid project is returned as active.

acceptance.given: Persisted active project is archived or fails path validation
acceptance.then: A valid fallback is returned or explicit onboarding-required state is returned when none exists.

nonGoals: No direct filesystem implementation in query

patterns.name: CQRS Query Responsibility
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 4 queries are read-only and deterministic

patterns.name: Hexagonal Validator Port
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 2 infra checks behind ports

context: Without persisted active state, users lose context every launch and onboarding/selector flows become inconsistent.
technicalNotes: Keep fallback algorithm deterministic and tested. Merge-safe: augment repository/query behavior with isolated tests; avoid changing route layer here. Models: Codex gpt-5.2-codex (medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (medium).
